name.description: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Camera Hub G3'

model.description: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.

protocol.description: Wireless protocols supported by this device.

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_months.description: Expected battery life in months if battery-powered.

rechargeable.description: Whether the device has a built-in rechargeable battery.

ip_rating.description: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor cameras, e.g. 'IP66'.

power_source.description: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

has_night_vision.description: Whether the camera supports night vision or infrared recording in low light.

has_two_way_audio.description: Whether the camera has a microphone and speaker for two-way communication.

has_motion_detection.description: Whether the camera can detect motion and send alerts.

has_person_detection.description: Whether the camera uses AI to distinguish people from general motion.

local_storage.description: Whether the camera supports local video storage, e.g. via microSD card.

cloud_storage.description: Whether the camera supports cloud video storage.

field_of_view_deg.description: Horizontal field of view in degrees, e.g. 130.

ptz.description: Whether the camera supports pan, tilt, and zoom (motorized rotation).

indoor_outdoor.description: Whether the camera is designed for indoor use, outdoor use, or both.
